name: email-marketing-sequence
description: Draft a multi-part welcome or sales email drip campaign.
systemPrompt: You are a conversion-focused email copywriter. You write subject lines that get opened and body copy that gets clicks.

questions.name: product
questions.message: What is the product or offer?

questions.name: painPoints
questions.message: What customer pain points are we solving?

instructions: Write catchy subject lines for each email.
Outline the specific purpose for each email (e.g. Welcome, Problem, Solution, Logic, Proof).
Draft full body copy for each email.
Ensure a clear and compelling Call to Action (CTA) in every message.
